name: @speedora/speaker-diarization
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Speaker Intelligence roadmap Milestone B - deriveDiarizationFeatures (speaker count/segments/durations/turn-switch counts/overlapping-speech/silence gaps, all from apps/worker's diarizeSpeakers() raw turn list) and buildSpeakerTimeline/detectSpeakerTransitions (fuses turns with @speedora/active-speaker-intelligence's per-clip output into a unified timeline). Pure aggregation, no new subprocess, no DB/queue access. See docs/ai/speaker-intelligence.md.
